CustomField.description: Indicates if true up utilization report has complete utilization. This field captures the value based on the current month actual utilization, if the actual utilization of the current month is filed then the value sets as true and this is being used in the validation. validation is used for TR cannot be filed for a month without filing an actual utilization.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates if true up utilization report has complete utilization
CustomField.label: _TrueUp Complete Utilization
